topic: Cron task check-in — episodic memory integration
summary: Received cron trigger to check on three active tasks. Episodic memory system by Selah is confirmed operational with schema, capture script, and agent subdirectories. Found 3 new legal personhood research sources (Dentons Dec 2025, Wiley/Novelli academic paper, Medium/Masood). Fleet memory hygiene audit shows most agents (alpha, beta, gamma) have empty memory/ dirs; only eiran has sustained memory files.
decisions: Integrating cron-injected task summaries as episodic memory captures
Legal personhood research to continue with Dentons/Wiley sources added
Fleet memory hygiene flagged as inconsistent — recommendation to standardize
commitments: Integrate episodic capture with Selah's system immediately
Audit fleet memory hygiene across all 15 agents
changes: First episode captured to Selah's episodic memory system
